race.description: Kia Eastern Region Dealer Of The Year Hcp
race.comment: FLEETING SPIRIT (7) smart mare unlucky not to have a few more wins on the CV. Resumed with a fast finishing fourth over 1100m at this track after covering a stack of ground first-up. Gets map favours today and looks well placed over this trip. MAMUSHKA (2) good fresh mare expected to go on with it this prep. Gets her chance here with Roper's claim and primed with the two trials. Expected to go close. THAMES (4) struggled in two runs last prep after a long layoff and gets the blinkers applied today. Ran third to Beadman in her latest trial over 821m at Warwick Farm. Key jockey change and was placed at Listed level this time last year. Respect. INVISIBLE MAGIC (6) returned excellent figures first-up when she came from last on the turn with a slashing third over today's journey at Newcastle. Drops further in weight and must be kept safe.
